'''√r-h-b''' ('''karahab''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quadrille|quadrille]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-h-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quadrille|quadrille]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √r-h-b
|-
! Lemma
| karahab
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thirahab || jirahab || shirahab || kirahab
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthurahab || jujurahab || shushurahab || kukurahab
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thurahab || jurahab || shurahab || kurahab
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thurahab || jurahab || shurahab || kurahab
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || therahab || jerahab || sherahab || kerahab
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothorahab || jojorahab || shoshorahab || kokorahab
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thorahab || jorahab || shorahab || korahab
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thorahab || jorahab || shorahab || korahab
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || rahab || rahab || rahab || rahab
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || rahab || rahab || rahab || rahab
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || rahab || rahab || rahab || rahab
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || rahab || rahab || rahab || rahab
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thærahab || jærahab || shærahab || kærahab
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thatharahab || jajarahab || shasharahab || kakarahab
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || tharahab || jarahab || sharahab || karahab
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || tharahab || jarahab || sharahab || karahab
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || sharahab
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || gosharahab
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || gokisharahab
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || sharahabnü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || gosharahabnknü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokisharahabnü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || sharahabshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gosharahabnkshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokisharahabshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || sharahabro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || gosharahabnkro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokisharahabro
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || sharahabmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || gosharahabnkmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokisharahabmu
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || sharahabsher
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || gosharahabnksher
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokisharahabsher
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || sharahabng
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || gosharahabnkng
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokisharahabng
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || sharahabya
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || gosharahabnkya
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokisharahabya
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || sharahabyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || gosharahabnkyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokisharahabyam
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || sharahabnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gosharahabnknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokisharahabnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || sharahabnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gosharahabnknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokisharahabnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || sharahabnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gosharahabnknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokisharahabnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || sharahabshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gosharahabnkshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokisharahabshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || sharahabshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gosharahabnkshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokisharahabshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || sharahabshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gosharahabnkshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokisharahabshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || sharahabronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gosharahabnkronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokisharahabronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || sharahabroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gosharahabnkroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokisharahabroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || sharahabromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gosharahabnkromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokisharahabromu
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || sharahabmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gosharahabnkmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokisharahabmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || sharahabmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gosharahabnkmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokisharahabmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || sharahabmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gosharahabnkmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokisharahabmuro
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
